subcodes.title: The Seventh Principle—Equality of Men: Words spoken on 1911-11-15 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The Laws of God are not imposition of will, or of power, or pleasure, but the resolutions of truth, reason and justice.' All men are equal before the law, which must reign absolutely
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @justice and mercy, @unity; oneness of humanity, @relationship between government and people
